commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds cron empty-output repair and fail-loud handling, CLI repair-mode bundled-MCP disablement/session reuse, descendant-output fallback handling, sender-owner propagation, silent-reply normalization sharing, and focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. The original current-main bug is source-reproducible from the missing empty-output repair path, and the PR-head blocker is source-reproducible when emptyOutputHadFreshDescendants is true and resolvedDelivery.threadId sends delivery through the direct branch.
commands.review_followup: A narrow PR-head correctness blocker remains in one delivery branch and can be repaired with focused regression coverage.

target.title: [codex] Cron: repair empty sanitized final replies
target.author: mysebbe

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
